type_description: E-commerce luxury product showcase — body butter brand

color_dna.emotion: Opulent, intimate, exclusive — OLED black with warm gold accents creates a boutique luxury feel. The cream text on deep black gives editorial sophistication.
color_dna.saturation: muted-rich (gold is vivid, everything else is restrained)

typography_dna.text_personality: editorial-luxury (Playfair = traditional serif elegance, Outfit = modern geometric clarity)
typography_dna.typographic_move: Italic gold gradient 'Collection' in hero — the serif italic against geometric sans creates tension
typography_dna.flag: STRONG — intentional, distinctive pairing. No TYPE_GAP.

spatial_dna.negative_space_use: Deliberate — large section padding creates breathing room

existing_animations: Lenis smooth scroll (duration: 1.6, synced to GSAP ticker)
Hero load choreography (7-phase timeline: glow → gold line → eyebrow → Crown chars → Collection chars → taglines → CTAs → scroll indicator)
Custom cursor (dot + ring, lerp 0.12, magnetic effect on data-magnetic elements, cursor-label on hover)
Scroll reveals (gsap.from y:40-80, autoAlpha:0, power2/3.out, once:true)
Alternating card slides (left/right based on index)
Film grain overlay (SVG noise, 3.5% opacity, mix-blend-mode: overlay)
motion_dna.easing_character: smooth-to-springy (power2-3.out for reveals, back.out for CTAs, elastic for springs)
motion_dna.motion_personality: Weighty-luxury — animations have physical mass, not floaty
motion_gaps: No scroll-pinned product reveal (missing Apple-style canvas sequence)
Scent color swatches are CSS gradients only — no product imagery
No image artifacts at all — entire site is text/CSS-only

imagery_census.note: ZERO images on the entire site. All visuals are CSS-only (gradients, borders, glows, SVG noise). This is the #1 opportunity — AI-generated product photography would transform the site.

sections.name: Navbar
sections.notes: Hide on scroll down, show on scroll up. Glassmorphism bg on scroll.

sections.name: Hero
sections.notes: Gold glow orbs, gold line, char-split headline, taglines, dual CTAs, scroll indicator. Already has strong load choreography.

sections.name: About (Our Story)
sections.notes: Left text, right glassmorphism card with 4 key stats. Corner accents. Vertical gold parallax line.

sections.name: Products
sections.notes: Size cards (Travel/Everyday/Indulgence) with price counters. Dark card bg.

sections.name: Scents
sections.notes: 3 scent cards + Pure. Color swatch left, text right (alternating). Scent profile tags.

sections.name: Collections
sections.notes: King Scent / Queen Scent cards. Offset layout. Gradient hero bands.

sections.name: Ingredients
sections.notes: 7 ingredients with numbered rows. Alternating slide-in from sides.

sections.name: Contact
sections.notes: Instagram CTA + contact cards. Gold rule divider.

sections.name: Footer
sections.notes: Brand, nav, info, tagline. Gold glow gradient line.

strengths: Exceptional typography pairing (Playfair Display italic gold gradient + Outfit geometric)
Hero load choreography is premium — 7-phase timeline with char splits, weighty easing
Custom cursor with magnetic effect and label system already implemented
Lenis + GSAP + ScrollTrigger properly synced (ticker + lagSmoothing)
Reduced-motion handling on EVERY component (not just lip service)
Film grain overlay adds depth without being heavy
Glassmorphism used sparingly and appropriately (About section card)
All hover states use spring easing (cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1))
Focus-visible states on all interactive elements
Content is genuinely well-written — luxury copy that doesn't feel fake
Scent alternating card layout creates visual rhythm
Eyebrow text with animated letter-spacing is a nice touch

gaps.description: ZERO images on the entire site. No product photography, no lifestyle shots, no hero imagery. Everything is CSS gradients and text.
gaps.leverage: AI-generated product photography would immediately elevate this from 'good concept' to 'premium brand'. This is the single highest-ROI improvement possible.

gaps.description: No scroll-driven product reveal (Canvas + ScrollTrigger). The site scrolls linearly — missing the Apple/DJI-style immersive product experience.
gaps.leverage: A scroll sequence showing the body butter jar opening, cream texture, ingredient reveal would be the unforgettable moment.

gaps.description: No page transitions. Navigating to /shop or /shop/[scent] is a hard cut.
gaps.leverage: Barba.js or Next.js AnimatePresence would add cohesion between pages.

gaps.description: No 3D product visualization. Could benefit from a rotating product jar.
gaps.leverage: Nice to have but not critical — the scroll sequence handles the immersive reveal.

gaps.description: Scent card color swatches are just flat CSS gradients. No depth, no texture, no visual interest.
gaps.leverage: AI-generated atmospheric images for each scent would add major visual richness.

brand_personality_matrix.summary: Crown Collection is a serious luxury brand that uses bold visual techniques (gold accents, dramatic typography, glassmorphism) but maintains restraint through generous whitespace and editorial pacing. It's warm and organic in feel despite being digital-first — the text reads like a boutique lookbook, not a tech product.
